name: The Tomb of the Great Pharaoh Ramses
description:
The walls of this room are entirely coated with gold. A large emerald coffin
has been set into the floor, and the lid is laying on the ground next to it.
Several everyday items have been left here, such as a washing basin and a bed,
so that Ramses could take them with him into the afterlife.

exits.description: It is too dark to see there.
